title: gymnogramma paucifolia
intro: Gymnogramma paucifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of fern ally or a composite plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. Gymnogramma paucifolia has been reported to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce swelling, prevent infection, and promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
